studyName: Molecular and Cellular Correlates of Nerve Repair in Humans

variables.name: Age
variables.description: Age in years

variables.name: Boston_function_post
variables.description: Boston Carpal Tunnel Questionnaire Function Scale (ranging from 1-5)

variables.name: Boston_function_pre
variables.description: Boston Carpal Tunnel Questionnaire Function Scale (ranging from 1-5)

variables.name: Boston_symptom_pre
variables.description: Boston Carpal Tunnel Questionnaire Symptom Scale (ranging from 1-5)

variables.name: Boston_symptoms_post
variables.description: Boston Carpal Tunnel Questionnaire Symptom Scale (ranging from 1-5)

variables.name: EDT_grade_post
variables.description: Electrodiagnostic test severity according to the Bland scale

variables.name: EDT_grade_pre
variables.description: Electrodiagnostic test severity according to the Bland scale

variables.name: GROC_function
variables.description: Global rating of change scale for changes in hand function. Scale ranges from -7 (a very great deal worse) to +7 (a very great deal better) with 0 indicating no change

variables.name: GROC_symptoms
variables.description: Global rating of change scale for changes in hand symptoms. Scale ranges from -7 (a very great deal worse) to +7 (a very great deal better) with 0 indicating no change

variables.name: Gender
variables.description: Gender

variables.name: IENFD_post
variables.description: Intraepidermal nerve fiber density in fibers/mm epidermis

variables.name: IENFD_pre
variables.description: Intraepidermal nerve fiber density in fibers/mm epidermis

variables.name: Meisser_pre
variables.description: Density of Meissner corpuscles in corpuscles/mm epidermis

variables.name: Meissner_post
variables.description: Intraepidermal nerve fiber density in fibers/mm epidermis

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Patient identifier

variables.name: Sequenced
variables.description: Indicator showing if the subject skin biopsy samples have been selected for RNA-sequencing

variables.name: mean_nodal_length_post
variables.description: Mean length of sub epidermal nodes of Ranvier in micrometers

variables.name: mean_nodal_length_pre
variables.description: Mean length of sub epidermal nodes of Ranvier in micrometers

variables.name: number_nodes_post
variables.description: Number of nodes evaluated

variables.name: number_nodes_pre
variables.description: Number of nodes evaluated

variables.name: perc_elong_nodes_post
variables.description: Percentage of elongated nodes more than 6.1 micrometer (percentage of total nodes)

variables.name: perc_elong_nodes_pre
variables.description: Percentage of elongated nodes  more than 6.1 micrometer (percentage of total nodes)

variables.name: symptom_duration
variables.description: Symptom duration in months

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: CONDITION
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: GENDER
variables.description: Gender

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: LIBRARY_PREPARATION_KIT
variables.description: RNA-seq library preparation kit

variables.name: NORMALISED_RNA_QUANTITY
variables.description: Quantity of RNA used for library preparation

variables.name: READ_LENGTH
variables.description: Number of sequencing cycles

variables.name: RNA_ENRICHMENT
variables.description: Type of total RNA filtering

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: SEQUENCING_PLATFORM
variables.description: Sequencing platform used for RNA-seq

variables.name: SEQUENCING_PROTOCOL
variables.description: Sequencing protocol used

variables.name: regenerator_IENFD_FC
variables.description: Indicator of regenerator based on IENFD fold change post vs pre surgery.  Calculated from the bootstrap estimated confidence interval

variables.name: regenerator_IENFD_diff
variables.description: Indicator of regenerator based on IENFD difference post vs pre surgery. Calculated from the bootstrap estimated confidence interval

variables.name: regenerator_Meisner_diff
variables.description: Indicator of regenerator based onMeisner difference post vs pre surgery.  Calculated from the bootstrap estimated confidence interval

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
